title: quercus lanuginosa var. cerrioides
intro: Quercus lanuginosa var. cerrioides, also known as the Chinese corkbark oak, is a variant of the Quercus lanuginosa species, a type of evergreen tree native to China. The Chinese corkbark oak has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Quercus lanuginosa var. cerrioides include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory diseases such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the bark of Quercus lanuginosa var. cerrioides is often dried and made into tea, capsules, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
